video_action.quality_suffix: smooth motion, cinematic, high quality video
video_action.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, jittery, unstable, flickering

camera_movement_mapping.推进: camera push in, zoom in slowly, dolly in
camera_movement_mapping.拉远: camera pull out, zoom out slowly, dolly out
camera_movement_mapping.平移: camera pan, horizontal movement, tracking shot
camera_movement_mapping.环绕: orbiting camera, circular movement around subject
